data.title: demo: R2 — hello world object storage
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare R2 object storage.

## What to implement

* `PUT /upload` stores a text file in R2
* `GET /file/:key` retrieves it
* `wrangler.jsonc` with R2 bucket binding

## Verify

```sh
curl -X PUT https://<worker>.workers.dev/upload -d 'hello world' -H 'x-key: greeting.txt'
curl https://<worker>.workers.dev/file/greeting.txt
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/r2-hello`
